content.problemStatement: Write a program to input two student's names and percentages and print the name of the student with the higher percentage. In case they score equal percentages, print '**equal**'.
constraints:
- $1 \leq T \leq 100$
- $1 \leq N \leq 100$
- $1 \leq M \leq N\cdot(N-1)/2$
- $1 \leq u_i, v_i \leq N$
- $u_i \neq v_i$ for each $1 \leq i \leq M$.
- The sum of $N$ over all test cases won't exceed $100$.
content.inputFormat:
- The first line of input will contain two strings: the name of the first student and the name of the second student.
- The second line of input will contain two percentages: the percentage of the first student and the percentage of the second student.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, output on a new line the number of good subgraphs of $G$, modulo $10^9 + 7$.
